1.label: Lifeline
1.description: Reports the device status and allows for assigning single device only (main controller by default).

2.label: Square - On/Off
2.description: Assigned to clicking the button, used to turn on/off associated devices.

3.label: Square - Multilevel
3.description: Assigned to clicking and holding the button, used to turn on/off and change level of associated devices.

paramInformation.label: Lock Mode - Unlocking Sequence
paramInformation.description: 9-28086 - unlocking sequence calculated from button values

paramInformation.label: Lock Mode - Time to Lock and Locking Button
paramInformation.description: 5-1791 - calculated value: time to lock in seconds (5-255) + 256 * value of locking button

paramInformation.label: First Scene Sequence
paramInformation.description: 9-28086 - value of sequence, activates scene with ID 7

paramInformation.label: Second Scene Sequence
paramInformation.description: 9-28086 - value of sequence, activates scene with ID 8

paramInformation.description: 9-28086 - value of sequence, activates scene with ID 11

paramInformation.label: Sixth Scene Sequence
paramInformation.description: 9-28086 - value of sequence, activates scene with ID 12

paramInformation.label: Sequences - Timeout
paramInformation.description: Time that must elapse from the last click of the button to check if the sequence is valid

paramInformation.label: Single Button Associations - Operating Mode

options.label: Single click switches state to opposite
Single click switches state to opposite, double click sets to maximum level
Single click turns on, double click turns off

metadata.inclusion:
1. Set the main Z-Wave controller in (Security/non-Security Mode) add mode (see the controller's manual)
2. Power the device (insert the battery)
3. Click any button three times
4. LED will pulse white during the adding process
5. Wait for the adding process to end
6. Successful adding will be confirmed by the Z-Wave controller's message and green LED color
metadata.exclusion:
1. Set the main Z-Wave controller in remove mode (see the controller's manual)
2. Click the Circle and Minus buttons simultaneously
3. Click Triangle or Cross until LED glows green
4. Click Plus
5. Wait for the removing process to end
6. Successful removing will be confirmed by the Z-Wave controller's message
metadata.reset:
Resetting the device using the menu:
1. Click the Circle and Minus buttons simultaneously
2. Click Triangle or Cross until LED glows yellow
3. Click Plus
Emergency resetting the device on start-up:
1. Remove the battery
2. Hold Square and Plus while inserting the battery
